sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59243" key="korufisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορῠφ-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fillet</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">diadem</tr_>, esp. as a woman's head-dress; also, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κεκρυφάλου τὸ μέσον ῥάμμα</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
